arg.name: description_package
arg.description: Description package with robot URDF/xacro files. Usually not set, it enables use of a custom description.

arg.name: description_file
arg.description: URDF/XACRO description file with the robot.

arg.name: use_mock_hardware
arg.description: Whether to use mock hardware or real hardware.

arg.name: sim_prefix
arg.description: Prefix of the joint names, useful for multi-robot setup. If changed, joint names in controller config must also be updated.

arg.name: real_prefix
arg.description: Prefix of the joint names, useful for multi-robot setup. If changed, joint names in controller config must also be updated.

let.name: robot_description
let.value: $(command '$(find-exec xacro) $(find-pkg-share $(var description_package))/urdf/$(var description_file).urdf.xacro \ use_mock_hardware:=$(var use_mock_hardware) \ robot_1_prefix:=$(var sim_prefix) \ robot_1_ip:=$(var sim_ip_address) \ robot_1_port:=$(var sim_port) \ robot_1_session_id:=$(var sim_session_id) \ robot_2_prefix:=$(var real_prefix) \ robot_2_ip:=$(var real_ip_address) \ robot_2_port:=$(var real_port) \ robot_2_session_id:=$(var real_session_id)')
